final:
module wifi_connection_fsm (
    input clk,
    input reset,
    input start,
    input success,
    output reg [1:0] state
);

    // State encoding
    parameter IDLE = 2'b00;
    parameter CONNECTING = 2'b01;
    parameter CONNECTED = 2'b10;

    // State transition
      wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge reset or posedge dbg_halt) begin
        if (reset) begin
            state <= IDLE;
        end else begin
            case (state)
                IDLE: begin
                    if (start) begin
                        state <= CONNECTING;
                    end
                end
                CONNECTING: begin
                    if (success) begin
                        state <= CONNECTED;
                    end
                end
                CONNECTED: begin
                    if (reset) begin
                        state <= IDLE;
                    end
                end
            endcase
        end
    end
endmodule
